title: "[Topic]: "
labels: "meetup-topic, community"
assignees: ""
---

## What do you want to share?
*Choose one of the options below and delete the others to keep it clean!*

- [ ] **📰 Bitcoin News** (Price/market moves, ETFs, mining, corporate treasuries)
- [ ] **🏛️ Regulation & Policy** (Bills, acts, agency rules, government reserves, stablecoin law)
- [ ] **🟣 Nostr** (Clients, relays, zaps, protocol developments)
- [ ] **🛠️ Tools & Self-Custody** (Wallets, nodes, Lightning, a neat trick or tip)
- [ ] **❓ Question / Discussion** (Something you want to put to the group)

---

## The Details
*Give us the rundown! What is this about and why should we cover it?*



## Useful Links 🔗
*Drop any relevant links here so we can show them on the slides.*

- **Article / Source:** [Link here]
- **YouTube Video:** [Link here]
- **Nostr Note / Thread:** [Link here]
- **GitHub Repo (if applicable):** [Link here]

## Pictures / Media 📸
*If you have screenshots or charts, drag and drop them right here!*
